message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User1
participant "uic : UIController" as uic
participant "UIExt : UIExtension" as UIExt
participant "mp : MacrosPanel" as mp
participant "sui : ScriptUI" as sui

User1 ..> uic : select macro window
uic ..> UIExt : create(uic)
UIExt ..> mp : create(uic)
User1 ..> mp : Choose write a script
mp ..> sui : create(uic)
sui ..> sui : (hidden)

@enduml
